properties.description: Unique identifier for combined enterprise risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier combining userId and assessment date for holistic risk profile.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userId, Filter by assessmentDate

properties.description: Reference to the user from User_csod table.
properties.business_rules: Must reference valid userId in User_csod table, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Links combined risk assessment to specific employee.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with User_csod
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific userId, Filter by division

properties.description: Timestamp when the combined risk assessment was calculated.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be <= current timestamp
properties.business_description: Records when the holistic risk assessment was performed.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate timestamp format
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by latest assessment
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MAX for latest, COUNT by date

properties.description: Employee's overall compliance risk score (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Compliance training risk from ComplianceRisk_Silver, average if multiple trainings.

properties.description: Employee's overall attrition risk score (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100

properties.description: Combined enterprise risk score integrating compliance and attrition (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Weighted combination of compliance and attrition risk
properties.business_description: Holistic enterprise risk metric combining regulatory exposure with talent loss risk, providing single unified view of employee-level organizational vulnerability.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure correlation with component scores
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high composite risk (>75), Identify double jeopardy employees

properties.description: 2x2 risk matrix classification combining compliance and attrition dimensions.
properties.common_patterns: Critical Both, High Compliance/High Attrition, High Compliance/Low Attrition, Low Compliance/High Attrition, Stable
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values based on risk score thresholds (>50 = High)
properties.business_description: Strategic segmentation for prioritizing interventions: Critical Both requires immediate action, single-dimension high requires focused retention or compliance efforts, Stable requires standard monitoring.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistency with component scores
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Critical Both for highest priority, Filter by specific quadrants for targeted strategies

properties.description: Overall risk category based on compositeRiskScore.
properties.business_description: Business-friendly categorical classification for enterprise risk level.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistency with compositeRiskScore
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Critical and High, Create action queues

properties.description: Organizational impact of compliance non-completion (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Regulatory and operational impact dimension from compliance risk.

properties.description: Organizational impact if employee departs (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Talent loss impact dimension from attrition risk.

properties.description: Combined organizational impact score (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Maximum of compliance and attrition impact
properties.business_description: Worst-case organizational disruption potential combining both risk dimensions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure >= both component impacts
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high impact (>75) for succession planning

properties.description: Time-weighted urgency combining compliance deadlines and attrition likelihood (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher = more urgent
properties.business_description: Action prioritization metric considering temporal factors: overdue compliance trainings and high attrition likelihood create maximum urgency.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high urgency (>75) for immediate action queue

properties.description: Indicates if employee is business-critical across both dimensions.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Yes', 'No', Yes if overallImpact > 75
properties.business_description: High-value talent requiring executive attention for both retention and compliance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistency with overallImpact
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Yes for VIP management
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by Yes/No, PERCENTAGE of workforce

properties.description: Flag indicating if executive-level attention is required.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Yes', 'No', Yes if compositeRiskScore > 75 AND overallImpact > 75
properties.business_description: Automated escalation for C-level awareness: high-impact employees with critical risk across both dimensions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure logic consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Yes for executive action queue
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by Yes/No, PERCENTAGE requiring executive attention

properties.description: Recommended integrated intervention approach.
properties.common_patterns: Compliance + Retention Package, Compliance Focus, Retention Focus, Standard Monitoring
properties.business_rules: Can be null for low-risk cases, Based on risk quadrant
properties.business_description: Strategic recommendation for coordinated HR and compliance intervention, avoiding siloed approaches.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate format, Ensure not null for Critical/High cases
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific strategies for resource planning

properties.description: Employee's organizational division.
properties.common_patterns: Sales, Marketing, HR, IT, Finance, Operations
properties.business_description: Division context for risk aggregation and accountability.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific divisions, Group by division
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by division, GROUP BY division

properties.description: Employee's job title or role.
properties.business_description: Role context for risk assessment and impact evaluation.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific positions, Analyze by role
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by position, GROUP BY position

properties.description: Employee's direct manager identifier.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no manager, From User_csod.managerId
properties.business_description: Manager linkage for escalation routing and team-level risk analysis.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific managers, Group by manager

properties.description: Combined risk trend over last 30 days.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first assessment, Valid values: 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Identifies deteriorating vs improving holistic risk profiles.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Increasing for early warning

properties.description: Gold layer table combining compliance and attrition risk into unified employee-level risk profiles (snapshot from latest date). Sample data includes 36 employees who appear in BOTH compliance assignments AND attrition assessments, enabling integrated HR strategy.
properties.business_purpose: Provides executive-level visibility into combined organizational vulnerabilities, enabling integrated HR strategies that address both compliance gaps and retention risks simultaneously.
properties.data_lineage: Generated by INNER JOIN of ComplianceRisk_Silver and AttritionRisk_Silver time series tables (latest date only) on userId. Only includes employees with both compliance training assignments AND attrition risk assessments. Compliance risk averaged if employee has multiple assignments. Sample generated from Dec 16, 2024 snapshot showing 36 employees with dual risk profiles for integrated intervention strategies.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for longitudinal risk analysis.

properties.displayName: Enterprise Risk to Attrition Risk Relationship
properties.description: Each enterprise risk profile includes one employee's attrition risk assessment (latest date)

properties.displayName: Enterprise Risk to Compliance Risk Relationship
properties.description: Each enterprise risk profile aggregates employee's compliance risk assessments (averaged if multiple activities)
Each enterprise risk profile belongs to one employee

integration_metadata.snapshot_date: 2024-12-16 (latest date from both Silver time series)
integration_logic: Join both Silver tables on userId for latest date
Average compliance risk if user has multiple assignments
Select max impact from both dimensions
integration_metadata.sample_metrics: 36 employees who have BOTH compliance assignments AND attrition assessments
integration_metadata.coverage_note: Not all employees have both risk types - only includes users with dual assessment coverage
integration_metadata.source_data_volume: Joins ~100 compliance assignments with 100 attrition assessments, resulting in 36 matches on Dec 16, 2024
